expected_properties: clk_div toggles after a number of clk cycles that is within the expected range derived from the even NUM_DIV parameter
No X or Z values appear on clk_div during the observation window
additional_cases.goal: Confirm that the divided clock output exhibits a toggle edge consistent with an even division factor, without assuming a fixed cycle latency.
notes: Timing is observed conservatively; the exact cycle count for the toggle is not assumed.
preconditions: Reset has been released and the design is in stable operation
stimulus_intent: Run the clock for at least NUM_DIV cycles after reset release and watch for the first toggle of clk_div
timing_assumptions: Allow up to NUM_DIV cycles for the first toggle; do not require exact-cycle alignment

expected_properties: clk_div toggles at least once after reset release
Counter wraps correctly when reaching half of NUM_DIV - 1
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Validate that after reset release the divider produces a periodic toggling output consistent with an even division factor.
notes: Assumes NUM_DIV is an even constant >= 2 as described in the spec.
stimulus_intent: Release reset and run the clock for enough cycles to observe at least two toggles of clk_div
timing_assumptions: Do not assume exact-cycle latency; allow observation window of up to NUM_DIV cycles per half period
